title: Independently verify VS Code and Obsidian thin clients

do_not_read: other directories in ~/dev unless explicitly referenced

scope: Independent verification of editor host glue, thin-client boundaries, tests, and protocol consistency.
goals: Inspect clients for provider-pi imports or provider-specific logic.
Verify both clients construct the same protocol shape and call broker only.
Verify debounce and stale cancellation behavior.
Criticize usability gaps for MVP acceptance and distinguish blockers from limitations.
non_goals: Do not add features except tiny verification fixups.
Do not run full GUI editor smoke tests unless already configured and cheap.
success_criteria: If verification fails, include concrete issues and revive MVP-040 or spawn a fix task.
If verification passes, mark client artifacts as trusted in the handoff.
